a:r.a:t: Maria Schmidt - 15 years experience in e-commerce, certified PMP, leads client communication and sprint planning
Thomas Weber - Senior consultant specializing in retail solutions, REWE domain expert since 2019
Lisa Chen - Full-stack developer, Java/Spring Boot and React, 8 years enterprise experience
Jan Kowalski - Backend architect, microservices and cloud-native, AWS certified
Sarah Mueller - QA lead, test automation with Selenium and Cypress, CI/CD pipeline specialist
Ahmed Hassan - DevOps engineer, Kubernetes and Terraform, monitoring and observability expert
